title: hieracium incisum subsp. neilreichii
intro: Hieracium incisum subsp. neilreichii is a subspecies of the Hieracium incisum plant, commonly known as a type of hawkweed. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium incisum subsp. neilreichii are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to support immune function and overall well-being.
